parameters.query:
INSERT INTO exceptions
  (run_id, exception_type, charge_id, deal_id, email, amount, confidence, detail)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8)
ON CONFLICT (exception_type, charge_id, deal_id)
DO UPDATE SET last_seen = now();

INSERT INTO runs
  (started_at, window_start, window_end, payments_fetched, deals_fetched, matched, exceptions, status)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, 'ok')
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO matches (run_id, charge_id, deal_id, confidence, reasons)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5);

parameters.jsonBody: { "text": "Reconciliation run failed. Check the `runs` table for details." }

parameters.query: UPDATE runs SET status='failed', error=$1 WHERE id=$2;
